case_title: ALI AKBARI VS. PHILIP TURCY et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TURCY, PHILIP
NOTICE OF OBJECTION TO TRIAL DATE FILED BY DEFENDANT TURCY, PHILIP
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR OBJECTION HEARING HEARING SET FOR MAY-01-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN-13-2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ALI AKBARI'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 15, 2013, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION. PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER WITH THE OPPOSITION THAT REFLECTS THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR6185.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-07-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ALI AKBARI'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473, PLAINTIFF MAY FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 5 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER TO ADD A CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, AS SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF'S MOVING PAPERS. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN PREJUDICE. THE MOTION IS TIMELY. THE TRIAL IS SET IN JANUARY 13, 2014. THE COURT DOES NOT ADDRESS THE MERITS OF THE CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ALI AKBARI'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH THE PROCEDURES SET FORTH IN CRC 3.1324. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE A DECLARATION IN ACCORDANCE WITH CRC 3.1324(B),AND TO IDENTIFY CHANGES IN THE PROPOSED AMENDED COMPLAINT AS REQUIRED BY CRC 3.1324(A). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-13-2013 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-03-2013 Set For Trial On Jan-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Ali Akbari'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Ali Akbari'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint is Granted. Pursuant to CCP section 473, Plaintiff may file an amended complaint within 5 days of entry of this order to add a claim for punitive damages, as set forth in plaintiff's moving papers. Defendant has not shown prejudice. The motion is timely. The trial is set in January 13, 2014. The Court does not address the merits of the claim for punitive damages. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint In Support Of Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MATTHEW QUINLAN, ESQ., 415.345.4282, FOR PLAINTIFF ALI AKBARI.
SEAN MORIARTY, ESQ., 415.391.1113, FOR DEFENDANT PHILIP TURSY.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling WITH MODIFICATION. PLAINTIFF ALI AKBARI'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint is continued to AUGUST 15, 2013, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide a courtesy copy of the opposition. Please attach a cover letter with the opposition that reflects the new hearing date. The Court has the moving and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.

Ntc Of Mtn For Leave To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ALI AKBARI's MoTion For Leave To Amend Complaint TO ADD PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM IS Denied, without prejudice. Plaintiff has not complied with the procedures set forth in CRC 3.1324. Plaintiff failed to file a declaration in accordance with CRC 3.1324(b),and to identify changes in the proposed amended complaint as required by CRC 3.1324(a). Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
